programme.desc: Aaron vaknar på sin fodelsedag, bakfull och i onåd hos Marnie. På Aarons fest har Gary och Abbie ogonen på de andra, och Marnie ger Aaron en present han aldrig glommer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Galningarna ar i Rom och Anna har gett dem jobbet att visa hur man festar på Geordie-vis! Nathan ar arg på Chloe, Gaz och Abbie kommer varann nara. Aaron sager till Gaz att han vill forsoka med Marnie, men vad tycker hon?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Sammi berattar for tjejerna. Angelina behover fortfarande få svar.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jersey-familjen traffas i MTV:s studio på Time Square for att snacka kottbullar och sasongens stora bråk. Är det okej mellan Angelina och Mike? Kan en ny bastis komma emellan Jenni och Nicole? Det får ni se i Jersey Shore: Family Vacation Reunion.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: I del två av återtraffen graver Justina Valentine djupt i sasongens stora cliffhangers. Hur ar det mellan Angelina och 2.0? Vad blir nasta steg i Nicoles slaktforskning? En ovalkommen gast chockar alla.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Två dagar efter Angelinas brollop ar tjejerna osams på grund av talet som hordes over hela varlden och Mike "The Situation" blir "The Mediation" i hopp om att få familjen att bli sams igen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Wendale vill ha svar från den som kom undan - Emily. Charlie blir nyfiken, och stranden serverar annu ett ex som vill forsonas.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedy legend Jennifer Saunders and best pal, top actress Patricia Potter take to the road on a humdinger of a trip. Joined by veteran antiquers Phillip Serrell and Mark Stacey they shop in Berkshire, Hampshire and Oxfordshire before heading for an auction in Greenwich, London. Jennifer and Phil detour to hear about Fred Karno, the man credited with inventing slapstick comedy. While Patricia and Mark learn how a surgeon from Reading used his incredible sense of smell to successfully treat soldiers injured in World War One.And, Phil gets custard pied – what’s not to love?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Pierre Bonnard. You will discover his labour with Woman dozing on a bed, Summer in Normandy or The beach in low tide.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Caravaggio. You will discover his labour with Bacchus, Mary Magdalene or Christ at the Column.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vincent Van Gogh : une nouvelle façon de voir
programme.desc: La vie de Vincent van Gogh reste entouree de mystère : folie, maladie, suicide, les ingredients pour creer un mythe sont tous reunis. Beneficiant d’un accès complet et sans precedent aux tresors du Van Gogh Museum d’Amsterdam, ce documentaire met en lumière à la fois l’un des artistes preferes du monde et la collection riche et unique du musee. Decouvrez ces merveilleux chefs-d’œuvre sur grand ecran pendant que quelques invites y compris les conservateurs de renommee mondiale et des historiens de l’art offrent leurs interpretations et des explications sur le travail de Van Gogh.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Tout à la fois peintre et diplomate, Pierre-Paul Rubens (1577-1640) fut un personnage essentiel dans l’Europe artistique du XVIIe siècle. Il crea de vastes compositions pour les familles princières d’alors, comme le cycle sur la vie de Marie de Medicis, aujourd’hui conserve au musee du Louvre. Il incarne la veine baroque du Nord de l’Europe, developpant un style tout en mouvement et aux touches colorees lumineuses, comme dans l’Enlèvement des filles de Leucippe expose à Munich.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: "All is but impression. The abundance of impressions that gush forth from lyric drama must still be supplemented by the impression of abundance that gushes forth from architecture." C. GarnierThe edifice designed by Charles Garnier is considered one of the jewels of 19th-century architecture. The variety and richness of the materials used earned it unprecedented enthusiasm from the moment it was inaugurated.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « Les Tournesols » sont parmi les tableaux de Van Gogh les plus celèbres. Le musee Van Gogh à Amsterdam a consacre une exposition à ces œuvres et « Exhibition on screen », qui a eu un accès exclusif à l’evenement, nous guide à travers l’exposition pour enqueter sur les mystères qui entourent ces tableaux. Le film nous amènera egalement à Tokyo, Philadelphie, Londres et Munich pour suivre les 5 principales œuvres de l’exposition.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinerante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournee au musee Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’eternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son sejour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à decouvrir les nombreuses enigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son createur mysterieux - Vermeer. Qui etait cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour decouvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musee de La Haye et repondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: In this episode we will decipher the most famous works of Johannes Vermeer. He was born in 1632 and lived his whole life in Delft. He painted mainly interior scenes, everyday life with middle-class people but also with servants. He is the author of "The Milkmaid

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux amies de la scène et de la television, Ruth Madoc et Su Pollard, connues pour leurs apparitions dans la sitcom Hi-De-Hi, partent à la chasse aux antiquites avec Phil Serrell et Raj Bisram. Partis de Monmouth, ville frontalière du Pays de Galles, ils se rendent à Congleton, dans le Cheshire, pour une vente aux enchères.Ruth decouvre egalement lincroyable infirmière du XIXe siècle - et ce nest pas Florence Nightingale - tandis que Su visite lancienne ville romaine de Caerleon et trouve le temps daffronter Phil dans un amphitheâtre.Et Su tente de resoudre un vieux mystère... Phil porte-t-il une perruque ?

programme.title: Andy Warhol, Fluorescent
programme.desc: Warhol, revolutionary and controversial, was never afraid to break the mold and reshape the reals of art, advertising, and directing. But who was the real man being behind the colors in which he hid? Was it the art or the fame that controlled and spawned his unique creativity?

programme.title: Andy Warhol, back to China
programme.desc: In 1972, after a period of artistic self-doubt and a series of film experiments, Andy Warhol returned to painting. A subversive at heart, he abandoned Hollywood stars and seized upon the symbol of late-20th-century totalitarianism, Mao Tse-Tung, transforming him into a pop icon.Ten years after his first Mao, in 1982, the Pope of Consumerism visited China. 26 years later, we retrace his footsteps for 5 days in China with Christopher Makos. rediscovering his mythical trip with Andy Warhol. A constant back-and-forth between the China of today and the China of 1982. Its also an opportunity to compare the photos taken by Makos on his initial trip with those he took on his return to China.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Lhumoriste et animateur Jim Moir et sa femme Nancy Sorrell partent en road trip dans le Kent aujourdhui.Mieux connu sous le nom de Vic Reeves, Jim apporte sa touche dhumour unique à lachat dantiquites. De son côte, Nancy, mannequin et presentatrice tele, sait aussi marchander et elle est très competitive ! Le couple est accompagne par les experts Charlie Ross et Thomas Plant.Soyez attentif au don surprenant de Jim pour deviner l’âge de presque tout, à Dixon traversant les chutes du Niagara et à une leçon de navigation par longitude.Et surtout, la mysterieuse Mme Parker fera-t-elle son apparition à la vente aux enchères ?

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Red ! From Jean-Jacques Henner to Sonia Rikiel" at the Jean-Jacques Henner National Museum in Paris. The theme of red hair seems to be a real subject in 19th century painting. During this visit, you will be able to observe paintings by Auguste Renoir, Edgard Maxence but especially Jean-Jacques Henner and Sonia Rikiel.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: En 1840, Turner a peint le chef-dœuvre "Nuages et leau". Charlotte tente de comprendre son style libre, avec des taches epaisses. LAnglais et violoncelliste Dominic Seldis vient faire resonner son violoncelle pour vanter les merites de ce "Rembrandt britannique". Michel decouvre que le tableau a subi un traitement precaire, mais se demande comment. En quete de reponses, lequipe se rend à la Tate Britain puis sur une falaise anglaise venteuse. Un episode dans lequel un fer à repasser, un rocher de craie à Margate et un pot de cire dabeille jouent un rôle preponderant.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures takes you on a journey to discover the unsuspected secrets and treasures of the National Assembly in France. Some of the most delicate works are kept in the greatest secrecy. But this place, which is the temple of the French democracy, opens its doors to us exceptionally today. We will make you discover this emblematic universe, more known for its political episodes than for the treasures that it shelters.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures makes you discover the Bibliotheque Thiers in Paris. It is a place that houses many treasures that we do not suspect the existence. Today, we will visit this exceptional place which is the property of the Institute of France in search of the treasures it contains. Experts, historians, librarians, will guide us through the corridors and floors of this magical place.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The Museum of Hunting and Nature in Paris opens the doors of the imagination of our forests, our jungles, our savannah, and offers a very special experience, to the discovery of animals, and of the relationship, sometimes tragic, sometimes sublime, that we have with them. It is an ode to nature, elevated to the rank of art, and to its wild, simple, ferocious beauty.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus representative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant beneficie d’un accès exclusif à une grande variete d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quete de perfection de Degas à travers l’experimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en etudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controverses et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le venerait. Monet egalement. Renoir a ete crucial dans la creation du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement different, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Lucas Cranach l’Ancien (v. 1472-1553) est un artiste majeur de la Renaissance germanique, actif à Wittenberg dans la première moitie du XVIe s. Peintre officiel de Frederic le Sage, prince electeur de Saxe, il est proche du reformateur Martin Luther. Au-delà des thèmes bibliques, il s’interesse particulièrement à la representation du nu feminin, comme dans l’Adam et Eve de Besançon ou les fameuses Trois Grâces, recemment acquises par le musee du Louvre grâce à un appel aux dons.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Rediscover the paintings of Jacob Jordaens. This artist is the subject of a special exhibition at the Petit Palais in 2013-1014.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les legendes de la scène et de lecran, Charles Dance et Geraldine James, rejoignent les experts en antiquites Natasha Raskin et Will Axon pour cette excursion dans le Wiltshire.Charles trouve une paire de vases en argent de lepoque edouardienne quil espère rentabiliser lors dune vente aux enchères dans lEssex. Geraldine, elle, tombe sur un homme dans la rue avec un secretaire Empire français du XIXe siècle. Il lui en coûte une petite fortune - le pari sera-t-il gagnant ?Charles se retrouve dans le cockpit dun très vieil helicoptère tandis que Geraldine apprend comment un petit quartier de Swindon datant de 170 ans a influence la creation du NHS moderne.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous rencontrerons l’artiste Alain Godon. Des rivages de la France à la campagne anglaise, de parachutiste gerant de discothèque, Alain Godon a eu mille et une vies. Mais il est toujours reste peintre. C’est un peintre figuratif au coup de crayon naïf et gai, qui loin des modes, des courants et des engouements des musees, est plebiscite par de nombreux collectionneurs pour qui il travaille depuis son atelier à Waltham dans le Kent.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Italien painter, Sandro Botticelli.You will discover his labour with Abundance or autumn, The story of virginia, Venus and Mars.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Italien painter, Leonardo da Vinci.You will discover his labour with the Joconde, Salvator Mundi, The Cène.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considere comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclame. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passe mouvemente de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doue et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son genie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-meme et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Jean-François Millet (1814 - 1875) was a 19th-century French realist painter, pastellist, engraver and draughtsman. He is best known for his realistic rural scenes.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Cet episode presente les Thermes de Vals-les-Bains, un chef-dœuvre architectural conçu par Peter Zumthor. Larchitecte a reinvente lidee traditionnelle du bain en integrant de manière harmonieuse leau et la pierre dans un dialogue poetique. Il a utilise du quartzite local pour ancrer le bâtiment dans son environnement naturel, creant une atmosphère de calme et de serenite. Innovant pour son epoque, Zumthor a mis en scène leau dans tous ses etats – du ruissellement au brouillard – pour offrir une experience multisensorielle unique. Ce projet est un exemple exceptionnel de l’architecture minimaliste, combinant simplicite, fonctionnalite et une profonde connexion à la nature.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top Italian cooks Antonio Carluccio and Gennaro Contraldo are on a Road Trip around East Anglia. Restaurateurs, writers and old friends the ‘greedy Italians’ will be foraging for antiques in the company of experts David Harper and James Braxton. Watch out for some ‘explosive’ bargaining and an extremely tasty risotto! When he’s not shopping Antonio learns about the brave fisherman of Suffolk who saved mariners’ lives while risking their own. And, Gennaro has a trip to take a peek at a very special bird.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures makes you discover the Bibliotheque Thiers in Paris. It is a place that houses many treasures that we do not suspect the existence. Today, we will visit this exceptional place which is the property of the Institute of France in search of the treasures it contains. Experts, historians, librarians, will guide us through the corridors and floors of this magical place.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: An emblematic figure in Europe at the turn of the 18th century, this corporal who became Emperor of France unleashed the imagination of artists from whom he commissioned many works. Discover the victorious young “Bonaparte at the Pont d’Arcole” immortalised by the Antoine-Jean Gros in 1796. Observe also the portraits of all the guests present during the “Coronation of Napoleon” and his triumphant gesture as he crowned his wife Josephine in David’s masterpiece displayed in the Louvre Museum. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: John Singer Sargent - Portraitist of Paradox
programme.desc: A century after his passing, John Singer Sargent—celebrated for his portraits of French, English, and American high society during the Belle Époque—remains an enigma. This film offers a portrait full of contradictions.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Elle a ete peinte il y a près de 600 ans ; il sagit de la "Vierge à la fontaine" de Jan Van Eyck. Bien quelle soit la preferee de Charlotte, elle atteint les limites de ses capacites. Les details minutieux, lutilisation particulière de la peinture à lhuile et les pigments à sechage lent lui jouent des tours. Tandis que lequipe etudie la technique complexe de peinture à lhuile de Van Eyck, elle se rend egalement à Rome. À la recherche du bleu outremer, ils decouvrent au Vatican limpact de Van Eyck sur ses contemporains italiens et allument un cierge pour Charlotte à Santa Maria Maggiore.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Emil Buhrle collection at the Maillol Museum
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the Emil Buhrle collection at the Maillol Museum in Paris.This collection is that of Emil Buhrle, a student of art history who became passionate about collecting Monets works after a visit to the National Gallery in Berlin. He started his collection with works by Claude Monet, but continued to fill it with works by Cezanne, Gauguin... Works that you can observe during this visit.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Il y a une grande simplicite et un realisme troublant dans les figures du peintre lorrain Georges de La Tour (1593-1652). Marque par les œuvres du Caravage, il a produit des œuvres aux tonalites claires, comme la fameuse composition du Tricheur à l’as de carreau, mais aussi de nombreuses scènes nocturnes, au clair-obscur saisissant, simplement eclairees par la lumière d’une chandelle, comme dans Le nouveau-ne ou l’Adoration des bergers actuellement conserve au Louvre à Paris.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Cet episode presente les Thermes de Vals-les-Bains, un chef-dœuvre architectural conçu par Peter Zumthor. Larchitecte a reinvente lidee traditionnelle du bain en integrant de manière harmonieuse leau et la pierre dans un dialogue poetique. Il a utilise du quartzite local pour ancrer le bâtiment dans son environnement naturel, creant une atmosphère de calme et de serenite. Innovant pour son epoque, Zumthor a mis en scène leau dans tous ses etats – du ruissellement au brouillard – pour offrir une experience multisensorielle unique. Ce projet est un exemple exceptionnel de l’architecture minimaliste, combinant simplicite, fonctionnalite et une profonde connexion à la nature.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Les impressionnistes - et lhomme qui les a crees
programme.desc: Ce sont les artistes les plus populaires du monde. Les œuvres de Cezanne, Monet, Degas et leurs compatriotes representent des richesses inestimables. Mais qui etaient-ils vraiment ? Comment et pourquoi ont-ils revolutionne l’histoire de l’art ? Qu’est-ce qui se cache derrière leur succès intemporel ? Pour repondre à ces questions, le documentaire a obtenu un accès unique à une grande exposition mettant l’accent sur le collectionneur d’art parisien du 19ème siècle, Paul Durand-Ruel, l’expert des Impressionnistes qui prit la decision courageuse d’exposer les Impressionnistes à New York en 1886 et ainsi introduire la societe americaine à la peinture française moderne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du celèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la decouverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec genie. Le film ouvre egalement les portes de deux residences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait decouvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we meet the photographer Greg Gorman. He has photographed and worked with many celebrities. According to him, the biggest part of the photographers job is to get inside peoples heads and break down the barrier that these people create around them. He looks back on his most beautiful shots of celebrities and their stories.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top Italian cooks Antonio Carluccio and Gennaro Contraldo are on a Road Trip around East Anglia. Restaurateurs, writers and old friends the ‘greedy Italians’ will be foraging for antiques in the company of experts David Harper and James Braxton. Watch out for some ‘explosive’ bargaining and an extremely tasty risotto! When he’s not shopping Antonio learns about the brave fisherman of Suffolk who saved mariners’ lives while risking their own. And, Gennaro has a trip to take a peek at a very special bird.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: John Singer Sargent: Fashion and Swagger
programme.desc: John Singer Sargent is known as the greatest portrait artist of his era. What made his ‘swagger’ portraits remarkable was his power over his sitters, what they wore and how they were presented to the audience. Through interviews with curators, contemporary fashionistas and style influencers, Exhibition on Screen’s film will examine how Sargent’s unique practice has influenced modern art, culture and fashion.

programme.title: Andy Warhol, back to China
programme.desc: In 1972, after a period of artistic self-doubt and a series of film experiments, Andy Warhol returned to painting. A subversive at heart, he abandoned Hollywood stars and seized upon the symbol of late-20th-century totalitarianism, Mao Tse-Tung, transforming him into a pop icon.Ten years after his first Mao, in 1982, the Pope of Consumerism visited China. 26 years later, we retrace his footsteps for 5 days in China with Christopher Makos. rediscovering his mythical trip with Andy Warhol. A constant back-and-forth between the China of today and the China of 1982. Its also an opportunity to compare the photos taken by Makos on his initial trip with those he took on his return to China.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Painting the Modern Garden - Monet to Matisse
programme.desc: Passionne d’horticulture, Monet reste sans conteste le maître de la peinture de jardins dans l’histoire de l’art, mais il n’etait pas seul. Des artistes tels que Van Gogh, Bonnard, Picasso et Matisse ont utilise le jardin comme thème fort de leur œuvre. Ces grands artistes, ainsi que bien d’autres noms celèbres, sont rassembles dans une exposition innovante du Cleveland Museum of Art et de la Royal Gallery of Arts de Londres. De l’exposition elle-meme à la beaute des jardins d’artistes comme celui de Monet à Giverny, nous partons en voyage pour decouvrir comment le jardin moderne etait utilise pour explorer de nouvelles idees radicales et merveilleuses.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: François Boucher (1703-1770) is the archetypal French Rococo painter. He paints mythological themes tinged with gallantry, for example in the beautiful “Diane resting after her Bath” at the Louvre Museum. His patron was Madame de Pompadour, whose portrait he painted many times. Influenced by the Enlightenment movement, he devoted himself to Chinese themes (“The Chinese Garden”), to pastoral landscape (“Charms of Country Life”) and to a certain sensual Orientalism (“Brown Odalisque”).Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux amies de la scène et de la television, Ruth Madoc et Su Pollard, connues pour leurs apparitions dans la sitcom Hi-De-Hi, partent à la chasse aux antiquites avec Phil Serrell et Raj Bisram. Partis de Monmouth, ville frontalière du Pays de Galles, ils se rendent à Congleton, dans le Cheshire, pour une vente aux enchères.Ruth decouvre egalement lincroyable infirmière du XIXe siècle - et ce nest pas Florence Nightingale - tandis que Su visite lancienne ville romaine de Caerleon et trouve le temps daffronter Phil dans un amphitheâtre.Et Su tente de resoudre un vieux mystère... Phil porte-t-il une perruque ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous irons à la rencontre de l’artiste Annette Messager. Ses creations bousculent la scène contemporaine depuis presque 50 ans. Elle est l’un des plus grands artistes français recompensee par un lion d’or à la Biennale de Venise en 2005. Elle emploi tissu, et objets du quotidien pour representer l’intime. Mais elle reste aussi une artiste engagee. Installee dans la banlieue populaire de Paris, Annette Messager nous reçoit dans son atelier.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Netherlands painter, Rembrandt.You will discover his labour with The night round, the return of the prodigal son, Danae.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a British painter, William Turner.You will discover his labour with London from greenwich park, child hairdo’s pilgrimage, Snow storm.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Crafting
programme.desc: The series begins with three makers taking their items to Clare Priory Craft Fair in Suffolk. Heather quit her job to devote her time to making clay fantasy figures, so she needs to start making her hobby pay. John rents a huge studio full of quilting machines and fabrics to realise his passion, and Toni is devoted to crochet.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: Its final time as the competition reaches its climax with just two pairs of professional garden designers remaining. It’s a battle of the relative new kids on the block as Millie Souter and Max Parker-Smith take on Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill. Both pairs wowed the judges with their designs and planting in the previous round but now they take on their toughest challenge yet as they compete for the crown. They have to create show gardens at one of the World’s greatest gardens, RHS Wisley Gardens in Surrey, for a budget of £10,000. With a brief set by the gardens curator they’ll need to take their designs to the next level if their want to win, and they’ve only got 48 hours to complete them. Adding to the pressure the weather is also against them.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour ce troisième jour de competition, cest Nicolas, 27 ans, qui entre en scène. Cet Orleanais tout droit sorti de la generation Y est accro à la deco 2.0. Et oui, cest à travers les reseaux sociaux quil exprime sa passion pour la decoration. Et il semblerait que Nicolas ait aussi dautres casquettes...

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga

programme.desc: Decouvrez votre corps physique d’une manière nouvelle et differente en utilisant des repères d’alignement pour ressentir plus profondement votre espace corporel. Profitez du voyage offert par la sequence "Éveillez

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Les quatre chantiers sont maintenant finis. Anthony, Vanessa, Samia et Gregory vont entendre les critiques de leurs adversaires. Les proprietaires vont aussi rentrer chez eux et decouvrir leur pièce entièrement redecoree. Que vont-ils penser de leur nouvel interieur ? Quelle note vont-ils attribuer ? Qui sera le coup de cœur de Valerie Damidot et qui remportera le titre d’As de la deco de la semaine ?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadree par les equipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtes de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la venerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du metier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destines à la venerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frederic Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotte au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit Delphine Malachard, qui est intolerante au gluten. Ensemble, elles vont donc cuisiner des recettes sans gluten. Au menu : souffle au chocolat et financiers à la vanille et aux fruits rouges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo cuisine la reine des proteines vegetales : la lentille. Bonne pour la sante, digeste et delicieuse, elle remplace la viande et le poisson. Nous allons preparer des galettes de lentilles corail aux epices, avec une sauce au yaourt et à la menthe. Et pour la suite, un classique de la cuisine française : une salade de lentilles vertes avec de la saucisse de Morteau.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Feeding the family is the concern of billions of people every day on the planet and it has been completely forgotten. We will also see that we, as consumers, can change things by changing our eating habits because our health and sustainable development depend on it. We fly over Paris to discover the cultivated plains, the intensive breeding in the Beauce, the pesticides in Guadeloupe and the green Camargue where the ecosystem is threatened, until India where the limits of the green revolution are reached.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Yann Arthus-Bertrand continues his world tour in the name of sustainable development and environmental protection. He shows us the incredible wealth of our planet and goes to meet those who propose solutions to perpetuate farming and cultivation models. We discover how to feed ourselves without destroying in the Rhône-Alpes region, how to preserve the forest in Indonesia, but also the extent of GMOs in Alsace as well as the advantages of terroir in Provence-Alpes-Côte-Dazur.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is structured in two parts: work on the posterior chain followed by strengthening the anterior chain. Guillaume and Sabrina guide participants through exercises that can be done solo or with a partner, using a wall or a partner for assistance. With a varied and interactive program, this session is ideal for a group workout.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Strengthen and Surrender: Lower Body Balance for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: This moving meditation leads you through a series of postures that will strengthen the hips and hamstrings. Find balance between ease and effort while bringing a sense of curiosity to your experience of each posture.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit son amie Severine Ferrer, animatrice et comedienne, pour preparer des tartes. Au menu : le gâteau patate (specialite reunionnaise avec de la patate douce) et une tarte "Luarraine

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cette episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit son amie Suzie Palatin pour preparer de la cuisine antillaise. Au menu : colombo de poulet, en en dessert, un blanc-manger au coco.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: We begin in Nendaz at the MAD Retreat, where Mike experiences aerial yoga, blending strength, flexibility, and mindfulness. From there, we visit a Kneipp hydrotherapy facility, learning how cold water, movement, and contrast therapy support circulation, resilience, and mental clarity.In the UNESCO Moorlands of Interlaken, we explore pristine alpine ecosystems and discover traditional herbal remedies passed down through Swiss generations. The episode culminates in a summit of a Swiss Alp with new friends, celebrating movement, nature, community, and the healing power of mountains.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Our Swiss journey begins at the Neuro Culinary Center, where a gastroenterology researcher demonstrates how sugar affects blood glucose in real time. Through hands-on testing, we see immediate physiological responses, sparking conversations about metabolism, diet, and long-term health.Next, we visit the Herb Hotel, where hyper-local alpine ingredients create rich, grounded flavours connected to season and place. We learn traditional cheese-making methods before visiting Salzano, a renowned Green Michelin Star restaurant known for elevating Swiss mountain cuisine.The day ends with a sunset hike up a mountain, finishing with raclette melted over an open flame—a perfect celebration of the region’s flavour, simplicity, and beauty.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: At the VitalLife Scientific Wellness Center at Bumrungrad Hospital in Bangkok, Mike and Braeden undergo some of the most advanced longevity testing available today. Through comprehensive genetic panels, metabolic assessments, cardiovascular imaging, cellular aging analysis, and biomarker evaluations, they gain a deep understanding of their current and future health.They then undergo hyperbaric oxygen therapy, targeted light therapy, and personalized consultations to interpret their results and identify pathways for improving health span. The episode offers a rare look inside the future of preventive medicine and the growing global movement toward longevity science.Here, technology and tradition converge, revealing how we can extend not just our lifespan, but the years we remain healthy, active, and fulfilled.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Morocco - Sands of Time Part I
programme.desc: On Morocco’s coast, initiatives combine education, play, and sustainability to raise environmental awareness. The “Clean and Play” program encourages children to clean beaches in exchange for fun activities. Recycling also creates jobs for marginalized people. Sports and nature connection strengthen the link between health and environment.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Sahara - Sands of Time Part II
programme.desc: In the Sahara, we spend a night under the stars after a camel trek. Nomads share their lifestyle adapted to extreme conditions and the effects of climate change. Moroccan culture teaches us to slow down and savor each moment, valuing time and connection to nature.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: Its final time as the competition reaches its climax with just two pairs of professional garden designers remaining. It’s a battle of the relative new kids on the block as Millie Souter and Max Parker-Smith take on Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill. Both pairs wowed the judges with their designs and planting in the previous round but now they take on their toughest challenge yet as they compete for the crown. They have to create show gardens at one of the World’s greatest gardens, RHS Wisley Gardens in Surrey, for a budget of £10,000. With a brief set by the gardens curator they’ll need to take their designs to the next level if their want to win, and they’ve only got 48 hours to complete them. Adding to the pressure the weather is also against them.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Costa Rica - Pura Vida Part I
programme.desc: In Costa Rica’s Nicoya Peninsula, centenarians live long lives thanks to simple diets, meaningful routines, and strong social bonds. The “Pura Vida” philosophy encourages gratitude, optimism, and community spirit for a long, happy life.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to a cardio-dance workout as a team. Guillaume and Sabrina invite viewers to have fun while moving with easy-to-follow movements, perfect for a friendly moment. The exercises focus on dynamic movements and fun hip swings, ideal for those who want to combine fitness and dance. The session includes a small two-part choreography that can be reused with friends, especially during parties. The goal is simple: move, sweat, and share a good time in a cheerful atmosphere.

programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Strengthen and detoxify with this powerful and challenging sequence. Unravel to Reveal is a process of exploring the gift of presence in order to find what gifts the body can reveal. Be with your breath and let the process unfold.

programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training focuses on arm strengthening. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a warm-up targeting the upper body, especially the shoulders, neck, and wrists—essential for the session. The workout engages the biceps, triceps, and deltoids with exercises that activate and stabilize the scapular chain. The second block ramps up the intensity with a cardio section to boost endurance. Every joint is carefully mobilized to ensure a smooth, injury-free session in a high-energy and motivating atmosphere.

programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadree par les equipes de l’ONCFS. programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Une nouvelle semaine de competition commence. Anthony, Vanessa, Samia et Gregory ont rendez-vous à latelier. Le premier pretendant au titre d’As de la deco est Anthony, 35 ans. Ce Lillois, photographe et blogueur, est tombe très tôt dans la potion magique de la deco, puisque ses parents tenaient une boutique de decoration. Depuis, pour notre Obelix à la sauce design, cest devenu une veritable passion !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest la petillante Vanessa qui va se retrousser les manches. Cette Parisienne de 48 ans est une artiste infatigable. Collages, detournements dobjets et surtout peintures, tout est pretexte à donner libre cours à son imagination debordante.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit Delphine Malachard, qui est intolerante au gluten. Ensemble, elles vont donc cuisiner des recettes sans gluten. Au menu : souffle au chocolat et financiers à la vanille et aux fruits rouges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo cuisine la reine des proteines vegetales : la lentille. Bonne pour la sante, digeste et delicieuse, elle remplace la viande et le poisson. Nous allons preparer des galettes de lentilles corail aux epices, avec une sauce au yaourt et à la menthe. Et pour la suite, un classique de la cuisine française : une salade de lentilles vertes avec de la saucisse de Morteau.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour decouvrir des races anciennes de volaille reintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’eleveur Fred Menager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour decouvrir comment est attribue le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Perigord pour preparer un civet de dindon. Installee dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour decouvrir un etonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is structured in two parts: work on the posterior chain followed by strengthening the anterior chain. Guillaume and Sabrina guide participants through exercises that can be done solo or with a partner, using a wall or a partner for assistance. With a varied and interactive program, this session is ideal for a group workout.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Strengthen and Surrender: Lower Body Balance for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: This moving meditation leads you through a series of postures that will strengthen the hips and hamstrings. Find balance between ease and effort while bringing a sense of curiosity to your experience of each posture.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, le potiron est à lhonneur. Luana Belmondo cuisine un veloute de potiron aux epices avec des sables sales au parmesan. Et pour la suite, elle prepare des gnocchis de potiron avec une sauce au fromage onctueuse.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo invite son amie Eleonora Galasso pour une pizza party ! Elles vont dabord preparer une pâte maison. Ensuite, elles cuisineront une capriciosa avec des anchois, des câpres et du jambon, ainsi quune pizza fritta avec de l’origan et de la sauce tomate.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Les Heros de la Nature : Bangladesh - Partie 2
programme.desc: With Bangladesh as a running thread, Yann Arthus-Bertrand meets several people who have changed their lives to dedicate themselves to a major project. In Bangladesh, Yves and Runa Marre have created the Friendship Foundation. Among other things, they’ve created a floating hospital installed on an old barge bought in France. Julie Andersen, an ex-advertising executive from New York, has come to South Africa to defend sharks with her Shark Angels Foundation. In North India, Kartik Satyanarayan is helping to stop the dreadful exploitation of the lippus bears (dancing bears). He’s created Wildlife SOS, a preserve to rehabilitate the bears that have been rescued and to give work to the men of the tribe who were traditionally bear tamers and entertainers.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Our Swiss journey begins at the Neuro Culinary Center, where a gastroenterology researcher demonstrates how sugar affects blood glucose in real time. Through hands-on testing, we see immediate physiological responses, sparking conversations about metabolism, diet, and long-term health.Next, we visit the Herb Hotel, where hyper-local alpine ingredients create rich, grounded flavours connected to season and place. We learn traditional cheese-making methods before visiting Salzano, a renowned Green Michelin Star restaurant known for elevating Swiss mountain cuisine.The day ends with a sunset hike up a mountain, finishing with raclette melted over an open flame—a perfect celebration of the region’s flavour, simplicity, and beauty.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Les Heros de la Nature : Senegal - Partie 1
programme.desc: For this new episode, Yann Arthus-Bertrand travels through Senegal to encounter men and women who dedicate their lives to preserving the environment. One of the major ecological stakes of the country is fishing and the mangrove ecosystem which, like in some many other parts of the world, faces major threats. Yann Arthus-Bertrand presents the struggle of Haidar El Ali, chosen among one of the world’s most active ecologists. He creates protected marine areas and reforests the disappeared mangrove of his country. He’s managed to convince thousands of Senegalese to plant with him ten million mangrove trees.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Morocco - Sands of Time Part I
programme.desc: On Morocco’s coast, initiatives combine education, play, and sustainability to raise environmental awareness. The “Clean and Play” program encourages children to clean beaches in exchange for fun activities. Recycling also creates jobs for marginalized people. Sports and nature connection strengthen the link between health and environment.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Sahara - Sands of Time Part II
programme.desc: In the Sahara, we spend a night under the stars after a camel trek. Nomads share their lifestyle adapted to extreme conditions and the effects of climate change. Moroccan culture teaches us to slow down and savor each moment, valuing time and connection to nature.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Costa Rica - Pura Vida Part I
programme.desc: In Costa Rica’s Nicoya Peninsula, centenarians live long lives thanks to simple diets, meaningful routines, and strong social bonds. The “Pura Vida” philosophy encourages gratitude, optimism, and community spirit for a long, happy life.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Puma mot ulv
programme.desc: Pumaekspert Boone Smith drar inn i Bitterroot-fjellene i Montana for å kartlegge konkurransen mellom puma og ulv.

programme.title: Sjimpanseskolen
programme.desc: Sjimpansene i Sierra Leone har det vanskelig. Nå er de nesten utryddet, men Tacugama-parken hjelper til i kampen for å redde dem.

programme.title: Primate Planet
programme.desc: Vi drar ut på en fantastisk reise inn i den utrolige primatverdenen, fra tropiske tretopper til snødekte fjelltopper. Vi tar en inngående titt på dagliglivet deres, og avdekker bemerkelsesverdig oppførsel, sterke familiebånd og ulike personligheter som skiller de ulike artene fra hverandre.

programme.title: Den mystiske gorillaen
programme.desc: I skogene i Nord-Kongo har over 100 000 lavlandsgorillaer stort sett unngått kontakt med mennesker. Og det de skjuler, er helt utrolig. Gorillaene lever et sammensatt liv med bruk av redskaper og intrikat sosial adferd. Utforsker og primatolog Mireya Mayor reiser inn i jungelen for å avdekke hemmelighetene til de mystiske kjempene.

programme.title: Jaguar: Jungle Icon of Guyana
programme.desc: En ung jaguar skal til å dra ut på sitt aller viktigste oppdrag i livet: å finne sitt eget kongerike. Reisen tar ham gjennom varierte habitater, som alle har sitt eget utvalg av dyr. Det er kun om han kan bevise sin verdi at han kan ta tronen i et av de aller siste ville paradisene i verden.

programme.title: Sjimpanseskolen
programme.desc: Sjimpansene i Sierra Leone har det vanskelig. Nå er de nesten utryddet, men Tacugama-parken hjelper til i kampen for å redde dem.

programme.title: Primate Planet
programme.desc: Vi drar ut på en fantastisk reise inn i den utrolige primatverdenen, fra tropiske tretopper til snødekte fjelltopper. Vi tar en inngående titt på dagliglivet deres, og avdekker bemerkelsesverdig oppførsel, sterke familiebånd og ulike personligheter som skiller de ulike artene fra hverandre.

programme.title: Den mystiske gorillaen
programme.desc: I skogene i Nord-Kongo har over 100 000 lavlandsgorillaer stort sett unngått kontakt med mennesker. Og det de skjuler, er helt utrolig. Gorillaene lever et sammensatt liv med bruk av redskaper og intrikat sosial adferd. Utforsker og primatolog Mireya Mayor reiser inn i jungelen for å avdekke hemmelighetene til de mystiske kjempene.

programme.title: Utrolige australia
programme.desc: Australias frodige regnskog, våtmarker og eukalyptusskog huser noen av planetens mest unike skapninger. Vi avslører de spesielle tilpasningene som Australias merkeligste skapninger bruker for å overleve disse ekstreme habitatene, fra nebbdyrets bisarre anatomi til de grusomme skrikene til den tasmanske djevelen.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Den etterlengtede spinoffen til den legendariske The Incredible Dr. Pol-serien er endelig her! Med dr. Pol og hans sønn Charles i spissen, slår Pol-familiens tre generasjoner seg sammen for å øke sitt dyrekjære imperium og ta fatt på et ambisiøst nytt prosjekt: Å transformere 1416 mål med ubebygd land til en fullt funksjonell familiegård!

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Familien Pol må plante ferdig høyfrø, og de setter opp bikuber!

programme.title: Australias Land Of The Ancients
programme.desc: Vi legger ut på en fascinerende reise gjennom det eldgamle landskapet i det nordøstlige Australia – den mest biologisk mangfoldige regionen på kontinentet. Fra massive saltvannskrokodiller som speider etter sitt neste måltid til pungdyrmødre som beskytter ungene sine, avslører vi hvordan dyr overlever under de tøffe forholdene i et landskap i stadig endring.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: På planeten vår er det flere arter som kolliderer i naturens ville kamp for overlevelse. Fra elefanthanner som kjemper om en gruppe hunner, til en kamp mellom en løveflokk og en sulten hyene-klan, disse drapsmaskinene kjemper med tenner og klør for å vinne mat, territorier og retten til slektslinjen. Vær vitne til slåss-evnene til planetens mest fryktløse skapninger i det de kjemper for overlevelsen i de dødeligste konflikter.

programme.title: Utrolige australia
programme.desc: Australias frodige regnskog, våtmarker og eukalyptusskog huser noen av planetens mest unike skapninger. Vi avslører de spesielle tilpasningene som Australias merkeligste skapninger bruker for å overleve disse ekstreme habitatene, fra nebbdyrets bisarre anatomi til de grusomme skrikene til den tasmanske djevelen.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: På planeten vår er det flere arter som kolliderer i naturens ville kamp for overlevelse. Fra elefanthanner som kjemper om en gruppe hunner, til en kamp mellom en løveflokk og en sulten hyene-klan, disse drapsmaskinene kjemper med tenner og klør for å vinne mat, territorier og retten til slektslinjen. Vær vitne til slåss-evnene til planetens mest fryktløse skapninger i det de kjemper for overlevelsen i de dødeligste konflikter.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Afrika er hjem til naturens mest fryktede rovdyr som geparder, løver og hyener med flere. I villmarken er kampen om overlevelse aldri ensidig. Selv om Afrikas drapsmaskiner er noen av de beste jegerne i dyreriket, er byttedyrene deres formidable på sin egen måte. Vær vitne til at en gepardmor møtes ansikt til ansikt med en gaselles kraftige våpen, og se hva som skjer når tre hann-løver gjør sitt livs feil, og prøver å slakte et stridslystent neshorn.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: En hunnleopard slåss om lunsjen mot en stor hann, og se hvordan nilvaranen bruker halen som et dødelig våpen.

programme.title: Utrolige australia
programme.desc: Australias frodige regnskog, våtmarker og eukalyptusskog huser noen av planetens mest unike skapninger. Vi avslører de spesielle tilpasningene som Australias merkeligste skapninger bruker for å overleve disse ekstreme habitatene, fra nebbdyrets bisarre anatomi til de grusomme skrikene til den tasmanske djevelen.

programme.title: Utrolige australia
programme.desc: De lange strekningene med rikholdige habitater som finnes langs Australias ville kyst er hjemmet til noen av planetens mest magiske skapninger. I disse enorme kystområdene og sjøen finner vi episke migrasjoner, fascinerende parringsritualer og ekstreme kamper mellom rovdyr og bytte.

programme.title: Australias Wild Woodlands
programme.desc: Australias vidstrakte eukalyptusskoger huser et utrolig utvalg av arter som ikke finnes andre stedet i verden. Mange av disse eldgamle økosystemene har i stor grad forblitt uendret helt siden dinosaurenes tid, men nå er fremtiden usikker for flere arter. Vi avdekker hvordan klimaendringene endrer den sarte balansen for disse utrolige dyrene som lever i disse majestetiske skogene.

programme.title: Trekenguruer: Skogens spøkelser
programme.desc: En av Australias underligste skapninger, Lumholtz trekenguruer, er som spøkelser i skogene nord i Queensland. Vi vandrer gjennom villmarken i Atherton Tableland, for å få et innblikk i livene til disse sky klatrespesialistene.

programme.title: Australias Land Of The Ancients
programme.desc: Vi legger ut på en fascinerende reise gjennom det eldgamle landskapet i det nordøstlige Australia – den mest biologisk mangfoldige regionen på kontinentet. Fra massive saltvannskrokodiller som speider etter sitt neste måltid til pungdyrmødre som beskytter ungene sine, avslører vi hvordan dyr overlever under de tøffe forholdene i et landskap i stadig endring.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Gjør deg klar til litt liv og røre! Fra brautende fugler til vonde hover, setter veterinærene i gang med å helbrede poter, kjever, til og med dun på lykkeanden hans. Dyrlegene fører en episk kamp for å redde en ku som sliter med å føde, dr. Lisa behandler en husky som har blitt påkjørt av en lastebil, og dr. Nicole undersøker et valpekull som har mange problemer. Polerne ønsker velkommen til sin nyeste pelsbaby, Christy, en vilter bengalsk kattunge.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Halter, klumper og kamelpukler! Fra husdyr til eksotiske dyr, dr. Pol og teamet hans er vitne til en rekke skader i det harde vinterværet. Følelsene blir intense når dr. Nicole behandler sin egen elskede beagle. Dr. Pol finner ut at noe er på gang med en bøllete kamel, og det er alle menn til pumpene når en akuttfødsel med 11 valper settes i gang.

programme.title: Utemmede Filippinene
programme.desc: Vi begynner på den lille øya Batan, der vi treffer en unik slange og en utbredt landkrabbe.

programme.title: Utemmede Filippinene
programme.desc: På veien fra skilpaddene på Palawan-kysten til den unike nasjonalparken ved Tubbataha treffer vi på flere kjemper, som hvalhai og djevelrokker.

programme.title: Australias Land Of The Ancients
